title: pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. alba
intro: Pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. alba, also known as false fumitory, is a plant species within the family Papaveraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. alba include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent.
